summary: Provides CRUD operations for user management with in-memory storage

requirements.title: Create User
requirements.statement: The system SHALL create a new user with unique identifier and provided attributes

acceptance.given: User data with valid unique ID and required fields
acceptance.when: The create user API is called
acceptance.outcome: User is successfully created and stored in memory

acceptance.when: The create user API is called
acceptance.outcome: Error response indicating duplicate ID is returned

acceptance.given: User data with missing required fields
acceptance.when: The create user API is called
acceptance.outcome: Error response indicating invalid data format is returned

requirements.title: Read User
requirements.statement: The system SHALL retrieve user details by ID

acceptance.when: The read user API is called
The read user API is called
acceptance.outcome: Error response indicating user not found is returned

requirements.title: Update User
requirements.statement: The system SHALL update existing user attributes

acceptance.given: Valid user ID and update data
acceptance.when: The update user API is called
The update user API is called
acceptance.outcome: Error response indicating user not found is returned

acceptance.when: The update user API is called
acceptance.outcome: Only provided fields are updated while others remain unchanged

requirements.title: Delete User
requirements.statement: The system SHALL remove a user by ID

acceptance.when: The delete user API is called
acceptance.outcome: User is successfully removed from storage

acceptance.when: The delete user API is called
acceptance.outcome: Error response indicating user not found is returned

rules.rule: All user data must be stored in temporary in-memory storage
rules.rationale: Implementation requirement for transient data storage

rules.rule: User IDs must be unique across all users
rules.rationale: Ensures data integrity and proper identification

rules.rule: Validation must be performed on all user input data
rules.rationale: Prevents invalid or malformed data from being stored
